title: Restarting
drDigitalIntro:
Sometimes your laptop needs a restart.
• Restarting turns it fully off and back on.
• Do this if it gets slow or stuck.
• It fixes most problems when closing an app doesn't.
drDigitalSuccess: Great — now you know when a restart can help.
drDigitalHint: Take your time reading through this, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
